title: Euno - AWS Security Hub custom insights (Sprint-1 OBS parity)
description: Custom Security Hub insights that group the CloudWatch Alarm-driven findings produced by `cloudwatch-alarms.yaml` into the same operational views as the Microsoft Sentinel rules in `infra/sentinel/analytic-rules.json`. Apply with: aws securityhub create-insight --cli-input-json file://<one of these objects>.

insights.Name: Euno - Capability denial spikes by agent/session
Euno - Write attempts under read-only sessions

guardDutyNotes: GuardDuty is enabled at the account level by Terraform's aws_securityhub_account resource (see infra/terraform/aws/main.tf).  It produces VPC- and DNS-level findings (e.g. UnauthorizedAccess:EC2/MaliciousIPCaller.Custom) for the EKS nodes hosting Euno workloads — these complement, not replace, the application-level rules above.

To correlate GuardDuty findings with Euno workloads, tag the EKS cluster and node group with `product=euno` (already done by the Terraform module) and create a Security Hub insight with GroupByAttribute=`ResourceTags.product` filter `EQUALS euno`.
